title: More Jukebox/Noteblock Variants
description: Jukeboxes and Noteblocks for every kind of wood
body:
[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/a-los-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/requires-quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Jukebox-Noteblock-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) ## More Jukebox and Noteblock Variants Want to make the blocks that produce the sounds as colourful as the sounds themselves? Well, you're in luck, because that is what this mod allows you to do. ![An image presenting all 12 newly added Jukebox and Noteblock variants in a Pale Garden](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/refs/heads/main/ModProjects/More-Jukebox-Noteblock-Variants/pres/mr_desc_banner.png) ### Adding 12 new _Jukeboxes_ and 12 new _Noteblocks_ to Minecraft!
How can I craft vanilla Jukeboxes/Noteblocks using modded wood types from Biomes o' Plenty, [Let's Do] mods, and others? Unfortunately, the vanilla Jukeboxes/Noteblock crafting recipe has to be overridden for the crafting of the variants to function.

But usually these mods add their wood types to the Vanilla recipe, which creates a conflict. Fortunately, there is also a fairly easy way around this issue.

That is what the "More Compatibility Variants" are for:
These datapacks/mods resolve this issue across all of our "More X Variants" mods, so you can craft jukeboxes, noteblocks and other vanilla items/blocks just as you would expect.
 
Currently available **_More Compatibility Variants_**:
 - [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-bop)
 - [[Let's Do] Meadow, (Nether)Vinery, Beachparty and Blooming Nature](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-lets-do)
 - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-ns)
 - [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-otbwg)
Would you like to see support for another mod with custom wood types? Let me know via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sA42pp6cuX), [GitHub](https://github.com/pnk2u), or [E-Mail](mailto:pnku@pnku.de)!
--- #### Fully compatible with [VinURL](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinurl) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/jjr56.gif)**]()
